<think> A co-operative federation or secondary co-operative is a co-operative in which all members are, in turn, co-operatives. This means that the members of CF Industries Holdings, Inc. were themselves co-operatives. A co-operative is a business owned and controlled by its members, who share resources and benefits. Given that CF Industries Holdings, Inc. was a federation of regional agricultural supply co-operatives, it is likely that it was formed to serve the needs of these co-operatives. The question asks for the year in which CF Industries Holdings, Inc. was a federation of regional agricultural supply co-operatives, implying that it was a co-operative itself. Therefore, I will look for the year in which CF Industries Holdings, Inc. was founded as a co-operative. After researching, I found that CF Industries Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1946 as a federation of regional agricultural supply co-operatives. Therefore, it was a federation of regional agricultural supply co-operatives for its first year, which is 1946. </think>
<answer> 1946 </answer>
